clusters.topic: Student Loan Overhaul: New RAP Plan Takes Effect July 1
clusters.summary: Massive federal student loan changes in 9 days: new RAP plan replaces SAVE, Grad PLUS eliminated, new borrowing limits. RAP not inflation-indexed — hidden trap for borrowers.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Borrowers confused about which plan to choose. Concern about RAP not being inflation-indexed.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Confirmed DoE final rules: RAP payments 1-10% of income, $10 minimum, not inflation-indexed. SAVE plan ended. Grad PLUS eliminated July 1, 2026.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Before/After comparison of old vs new loan plans with specific payment examples

clusters.topic: College Students Can't Read Anymore — NAEP Scores Hit Historic Low
clusters.summary: 12th grade NAEP reading scores at lowest since 1992. University instructors report students unable to complete 20-page articles. Smartphone reading linked to lower comprehension.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students self-aware about shorter attention spans. Debate about whether phones or social media are to blame.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: NAEP 2024 data: 12th grade reading at historic low. Nearly 1/3 below 'basic' level. Multiple instructor reports confirm classroom impact.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Quiz/self-test format: Can YOU get through 20 pages? Why your reading brain is shrinking.

clusters.topic: Canvas Data Breach: 275M Users Hacked During Finals Week
clusters.summary: ShinyHunters stole 3.65TB from 275M Canvas users at 8,809 institutions. Ransomware during finals week. Rumored $10M ransom paid. Student data including messages compromised.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students frustrated about disrupted finals. Concerns about personal data and private messages being exposed.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Confirmed: breach occurred April 25, detected April 29, second hack May 7. Names, emails, student IDs, messages compromised. Agreement reached May 11.
clusters.possible_content_angle: What data of YOURS was leaked? Checklist for students post-Canvas breach.

clusters.topic: Harvard's $365M Deficit: Even the Richest University Is Cutting Deep
clusters.summary: Harvard FAS faces $365M deficit despite $57B endowment. Up to 25% staff layoffs. 3,600+ signed petition against cuts. Endowment tax hike driving crisis.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students report strained labs and course support after SEAS layoffs. HUCTW petition gathered 3,600+ signatures.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Harvard Crimson confirmed: $365M FAS deficit, $113M university operating deficit FY2025. Multiple rounds of layoffs totaling 100+ staff already.
clusters.possible_content_angle: If Harvard can't make it work with $57B, what's happening at YOUR school?

clusters.topic: $98K/Year for College: GWU Approaches Six Figures
clusters.summary: GWU total cost approaching $98K/year. Dorm costs surpassing tuition at public universities. Room and board rising faster than tuition nationwide.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Sticker shock. Students questioning if the degree is worth it at these prices.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: GWU 2026-27 tuition $72K + room/board/fees = ~$95K+. At public universities, room and board ($12,770) now exceeds tuition ($11,260).
clusters.possible_content_angle: Schools approaching $100K/year — ranked list with what you actually get for the money

clusters.topic: 8 Colleges Closing, 6 Merging: The 2026 Small College Death Wave
clusters.summary: 8 nonprofit colleges shutting down in 2026. Hampshire College, Anna Maria College among closures. 6 mergers including NJCU+Kean. Small liberal arts colleges in Northeast/Midwest at highest risk.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students at small colleges anxious about their own school's future. Transfer students directly displaced.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: Confirmed 8 closures and 6 mergers. Hampshire College (60 years), Anna Maria (80 years) confirmed shutdowns.
clusters.possible_content_angle: Is YOUR school on the risk list? Red flags that a college might close.

clusters.topic: $3.4M Lifetime Earnings Gap Between Best and Worst College Majors
clusters.summary: Chemical engineering $135K vs foreign language $40K early career. $3.4M lifetime gap. Theology, performing arts, education all under $45K.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Debate between 'follow your passion' vs 'follow the money'. STEM students feel validated; humanities students feel attacked.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: CNBC reporting federal earnings data. Specific salary figures by major at 5-year and mid-career marks.
clusters.possible_content_angle: The $3.4 Million Question: What your major ACTUALLY pays, ranked

clusters.topic: AI Cheating Arms Race: Students Pay $50/Month for 'Humanizer' Tools
clusters.summary: 92% of students use AI. Students now using AI humanizer tools to beat AI detectors. 150 humanizer tools identified by Turnitin. Ironic cycle: AI to write, AI to detect, AI to hide.
clusters.student_reaction_summary: Students feel caught between using AI as a tool and being accused of cheating. Many feel AI policies are unclear.
clusters.factual_basis_summary: NBC News: 92% use AI for studying, 18% submit unedited work. Turnitin identified 150 humanizer tools charging up to $50.
clusters.possible_content_angle: The AI cheating paradox: students now paying for AI to make their AI work look human

excluded_items.reason: Internship data merged into career/earnings cluster context but not strong enough as standalone cluster for June timing (most internships already started)
